bird.name: 领夜鹰
bird.summary: 领夜鹰（学名：Gactornis enarratus），是夜鹰目夜鹰科的一种鸟类，属于单型的领夜鹰属（学名：Gactornis）。 特征 领夜鹰体重约52.8克，翼长约14.75厘米，喙宽度约4.4毫米，喙厚度约2.9毫米，嘴峰长约18毫米，跗蹠长约19.8毫米，尾长约10.3…

relations.subject: 领夜鹰
relations.evidence: Generally considered rare, though possibly also under recorded due to their secretive nature.Their threats include hunting and habitat destruction (generally deforestation)
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 领夜鹰
relations.evidence: Generally considered rare, though possibly also under recorded due to their secretive nature.Their threats include hunting and habitat destruction (generally deforestation)
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

relations.subject: 领夜鹰
relations.evidence: Generally considered rare, though possibly also under recorded due to their secretive nature.Their threats include hunting and habitat destruction (generally deforestation)
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
